description:
**Milestone:** CLI Package & Polish

Polish the HTML report to serve as the onboarding 'aha moment'. Add: project identity section (name, detected stack, commands), getting started quick links, visual score breakdown by category, and clear next-steps section pointing to the Getting Started notes tab and /setuplab command. Ensure the report works as a standalone artifact users can share.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/server/src/services/report-generator-service.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Report includes project identity section
- [ ] Getting started section with actionable next steps
- [ ] Visual score breakdown is clear and scannable
- [ ] Report references proto.config.yaml and .automaker/ structure
- [ ] Self-contained HTML with no external dependencies except CDN CSS
- [ ] Looks polished — this is the first impression

**Complexity:** medium

**Guardrails:** If this phase involves new or changed behavior, include tests that verify correctness. If this phase adds, removes, or changes a user-facing feature, API endpoint, configuration option, or service, update the relevant documentation in `docs/` to reflect those changes.
title: HTML report refinements
